name: Compagnie du Bois Sauvage SA
summary: Compagnie du Bois Sauvage SA, an investment holding company, engages in the leasing of real estate properties. It operates through Strategic and Real Estate Investments segments. The company leases flats, offices, and shops. It also invests in financial, industrial, food, real estate, and other sectors primarily in Belgium and internationally. The company was founded in 1873 and is based in Brussels, Belgium. Compagnie du Bois Sauvage SA is a subsidiary of Chemins de Fer en Chine.
